ddls:
CREATE TABLE "frames" (
  "frame_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each frame */,
  "frame_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the frame type */,
  "src_address" TEXT /* Source address of the frame */,
  "dst_address" TEXT /* Destination address of the frame */,
  "protocol" TEXT /* Protocol used by the frame */,
  "size" INTEGER /* Size of the frame in bytes */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the frame was captured */,
  "vlan_tag" INTEGER /* VLAN tag of the frame */,
  "ttl" INTEGER /* Time to live (TTL) of the frame */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("frame_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_frames_frame_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("frame_type_id") REFERENCES frame_types ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "frame_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each frame type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the frame type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the frame type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "devices" (
  "device_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each device */,
  "device_name" TEXT /* Name of the device */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device (e.g., router, switch) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the device */,
  "mac_address" TEXT /* MAC address of the device */,
  "serial_number" TEXT /* Serial number of the device */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("device_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "interfaces" (
  "interface_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each interface */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* ID of the device the interface belongs to */,
  "interface_name" TEXT /* Name of the interface */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the interface */,
  "mac_address" TEXT /* MAC address of the interface */,
  "mtu" INTEGER /* Maximum transmission unit (MTU) of the interface */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("interface_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_interfaces_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES devices ("device_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "filter_rules" (
  "rule_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each filter rule */,
  "filter_type" TEXT /* Type of filter (e.g., perfect, group) */,
  "src_address" TEXT /* Source address of the frame */,
  "dst_address" TEXT /* Destination address of the frame */,
  "protocol" TEXT /* Protocol used by the frame */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action to take (e.g., pass, drop) */,
  "priority" INTEGER /* Priority of the filter rule */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rule_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "filter_operations" (
  "op_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each filter operation */,
  "op_name" TEXT /* Name of the filter operation */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the filter operation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("op_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "filter_assignments" (
  "assign_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each assignment */,
  "rule_id" INTEGER /* ID of the filter rule */,
  "interface_id" INTEGER /* ID of the interface */,
  "assignment_date" TEXT /* Date when the filter rule was assigned */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assign_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_filter_assignments_rule_id FOREIGN KEY ("rule_id") REFERENCES filter_rules ("rule_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_filter_assignments_interface_id FOREIGN KEY ("interface_id") REFERENCES interfaces ("interface_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "frame_filter_matches" (
  "match_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each match */,
  "frame_id" INTEGER /* ID of the frame */,
  "rule_id" INTEGER /* ID of the filter rule */,
  "match_date" TEXT /* Date when the match occurred */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("match_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_frame_filter_matches_frame_id FOREIGN KEY ("frame_id") REFERENCES frames ("frame_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_frame_filter_matches_rule_id FOREIGN KEY ("rule_id") REFERENCES filter_rules ("rule_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, engineer) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the system was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., login, logout) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "frame_statistics" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each statistic */,
  "frame_id" INTEGER /* ID of the frame */,
  "rx_count" INTEGER /* Number of frames received */,
  "tx_count" INTEGER /* Number of frames transmitted */,
  "avg_latency" REAL /* Average latency of the frame */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_frame_statistics_frame_id FOREIGN KEY ("frame_id") REFERENCES frames ("frame_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "device_configurations" (
  "config_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each configuration */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* ID of the device */,
  "config_data" TEXT /* Configuration data */,
  "config_date" TEXT /* Date when the configuration was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("config_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_device_configurations_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES devices ("device_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "interface_configurations" (
  "config_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each configuration */,
  "interface_id" INTEGER /* ID of the interface */,
  "config_data" TEXT /* Configuration data */,
  "config_date" TEXT /* Date when the configuration was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("config_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_interface_configurations_interface_id FOREIGN KEY ("interface_id") REFERENCES interfaces ("interface_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "frame_buffer" (
  "buffer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each buffer entry */,
  "frame_id" INTEGER /* ID of the frame */,
  "buffer_data" TEXT /* Buffer data */,
  "buffer_date" TEXT /* Date when the buffer entry was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("buffer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_frame_buffer_frame_id FOREIGN KEY ("frame_id") REFERENCES frames ("frame_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "filter_rule_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each history entry */,
  "rule_id" INTEGER /* ID of the filter rule */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date when the rule was changed */,
  "change_type" TEXT /* Type of change (e.g., add, delete, modify) */,
  "changed_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_filter_rule_history_changed_by FOREIGN KEY ("changed_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_filter_rule_history_rule_id FOREIGN KEY ("rule_id") REFERENCES filter_rules ("rule_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "frame_capture" (
  "capture_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each capture */,
  "frame_id" INTEGER /* ID of the frame */,
  "capture_date" TEXT /* Date when the frame was captured */,
  "capture_interface" INTEGER /* ID of the interface where the frame was captured */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("capture_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_frame_capture_capture_interface FOREIGN KEY ("capture_interface") REFERENCES interfaces ("interface_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_frame_capture_frame_id FOREIGN KEY ("frame_id") REFERENCES frames ("frame_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "frame_analysis" (
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analysis */,
  "frame_id" INTEGER /* ID of the frame */,
  "analysis_date" TEXT /* Date when the frame was analyzed */,
  "analysis_result" TEXT /* Result of the analysis */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analysis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_frame_analysis_frame_id FOREIGN KEY ("frame_id") REFERENCES frames ("frame_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "alert_date" TEXT /* Date when the alert was generated */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., security, performance) */,
  "alert_message" TEXT /* Message of the alert */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alert_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each history entry */,
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* ID of the alert */,
  "acknowledged_date" TEXT /* Date when the alert was acknowledged */,
  "acknowledged_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who acknowledged the alert */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alert_history_acknowledged_by FOREIGN KEY ("acknowledged_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alert_history_alert_id FOREIGN KEY ("alert_id") REFERENCES alerts ("alert_id")
)
